heading: National security restrictions on use of funds and auction participation
label: 1404 National security restrictions on use of funds and auction participation
notes: References in TextSection 6402, referred to in subsec. (b)(2), is , which amended .section 6402 of Pub. L. 112–96section 309 of this title
amendments: References in TextSection 6402, referred to in subsec. (b)(2), is , which amended .section 6402 of Pub. L. 112–96section 309 of this title

children.heading: Use of funds
children.label: a Use of funds
children.text: No funds made available by subchapter II or III may be used to make payments under a contract to a person described in subsection (c).
that is required to be conducted by this chapter; or
in which any spectrum usage rights for which licenses are being assigned were made available under clause (i) of subparagraph (G) of paragraph (8) of such section, as added by section 6402.

children.heading: Person described
children.label: c Person described
children.text: A person described in this subsection is a person who has been, for reasons of national security, barred by any agency of the Federal Government from bidding on a contract, participating in an auction, or receiving a grant.
